barRaise.topFinding: The 2D-to-3D migration took its biggest step this cycle (full 37-building roster, all eight enemy archetypes, research panel, Continue-loads-3D), so the render lane is decided in every way except on paper. But the four self-contained process fixes that have led the action list for three reviews stay untouched, and two got worse: the dashboard writer still hardcodes the barRaise block to null on every release, and the world3d save format grew with no save_version while Continue now loads it directly. A new fork appeared - building_catalog_3d.gd hand-transcribes the roster with rates its own header flags as divergent from the tuned 2D numbers. Strong build velocity, deficit entirely on the cheap closing work.
